```{r ug_dense sh-y5y, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
master_table$longest_ug_region <- Biostrings::vcountPattern('TGTGTG', DNAStringSet(sequences), max.mismatch = 1)

master_table <- master_table %>%
  mutate(
    start = as.numeric(sub(".*:(\\d+)-.*", "\\1", paste_into_igv_junction_annotated)),
    end = as.numeric(sub(".*-(\\d+)", "\\1", paste_into_igv_junction_annotated)),
    intron_len = end - start,
    ug_density = longest_ug_region / intron_len
  ) %>%
  select(-start, -end)

d <- master_table %>%
  filter(new_cate %in% c("Early", "Late")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = cryptic, y = ug_density, fill = new_cate)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  xlab("") +
  ylab('UG-repeat density') +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Not cryptic", "Cryptic")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = plot_sensitivity_colors) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  geom_signif(
    y_position = c(max(master_table$ug_density) * 1.05,max(master_table$ug_density) * 1.05), xmin = c(0.8, 1.8), xmax = c(1.2, 2.2),
    annotation = c(get_significance(master_table %>% filter(new_cate %in% c("Early", "Late")),
                                    "ug_density", "new_cate", "cryptic", "no"),
                   get_significance(master_table %>% filter(new_cate %in% c("Early", "Late")),
                                    "ug_density", "new_cate", "cryptic", "yes")), tip_length = 0.02
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = plot_text_size))

#E. Density UG motifs by top-bottom in SH-SY5Y
master_table$max_psi_sh <- factor(master_table$max_psi_sh, levels=c("Top", "Bottom"))
e <- master_table %>%
  filter(max_psi_sh %in% c("Top", "Bottom")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = cryptic, y = ug_density, fill = max_psi_sh)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  xlab("") +
  ylab('UG-repeat density') +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Not cryptic", "Cryptic")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = plot_psi_colors) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  geom_signif(
    y_position = c(max(master_table$ug_density) * 1.05,max(master_table$ug_density) * 1.05), xmin = c(0.8, 1.8), xmax = c(1.2, 2.2),
    annotation = c(get_significance(master_table %>% filter(max_psi_sh %in% c("Top", "Bottom")),
                                    "ug_density", "max_psi_sh", "cryptic", "no"),
                   get_significance(master_table %>% filter(max_psi_sh %in% c("Top", "Bottom")),
                                    "ug_density", "max_psi_sh", "cryptic", "yes")), tip_length = 0.02
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = plot_text_size))
d + e
```

```{r postar3_coverage_fraction_early and late}
tdp_3 = rtracklayer::import('data/postar3_tardbp_reduced.bed')

coverage_numeric_tdp_flank <- create_coverage_vectors(flank_region, tdp_3)
coverage_matrix_tdp<- do.call(rbind, coverage_numeric_tdp_flank) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(name = flank_region$name,
           ID_exon = flank_region$ID_exon) %>%
    dplyr::relocate(name,ID_exon)

coverage_matrix_tdp %>%
    mutate(cryptic = ifelse(grepl("_yes",name),"cryptic","alternative")) %>%
    mutate(type = ifelse(grepl("acceptor",name),"acceptor","donor")) %>%
    mutate(timing = gsub(".*_","",name)) %>%
    reshape2::melt(id.vars = c("name","cryptic","timing","type","ID_exon")) %>%
    mutate(pos = parse_number(as.character(variable))) %>%
    left_join(data.frame(name = flank_region$name, strand = strand(flank_region))) %>%
    mutate(pos = ifelse(strand == "-", max(pos) - pos + 1, pos)) %>%
    group_by(pos,timing,type,cryptic) %>%
    summarise(cov_val = mean(value)) %>%
    mutate(pos = pos - (flank_size)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    group_by(timing,type,cryptic) %>%
    filter(timing %in% c("early","late")) %>%
    filter(cryptic == 'cryptic') %>%
    mutate(
        smoothed_weight = rollmean(
            cov_val,
            k = 5,
            fill = NA,
            align = "center"
        )) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    # mutate(type = fct_relevel(type,"donor")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = pos, y = smoothed_weight,color = timing)) +
    geom_line(size = 1.6) +
    facet_wrap(~type) +
    theme_bw() +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    ylab("Fraction of junctions bound by TDP-43 Postar3") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0,linetype = 'dotted') +
    xlab("Distance from cryptic splice site (bp)") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#de53b0" ,   "#173dd3")) +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 18))

```




```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
#F. Distance iCLIP TDP43 binding site SH-SY5Y
exact_splice_site <- resize(flank_region, width = 1, fix = "center")
overlaps <- distanceToNearest(exact_splice_site, tdp_3)

print("2F - Distance iCLIP TDP43 binding site SH-SY5Y")
df_iclip <- read.csv(here::here('data', 'all_events.closest_tdp_bind.bed'), sep="\t")

f1 <- df_iclip %>%
  filter(tdp43_sensitivity_sh %in% c("Early", "Late")) %>%
  filter(junc_cat != "exon_skip") %>%
  filter(abs(dist) <= 1000) %>%
  #filter(cryptic!="yes")%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = dist, fill = cryptic)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5, adjust = 0.1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim=c(-150,150))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("seagreen2", "darkorchid")) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  labs(x = 'Distance to the nearest TDP-binding site', y = 'Density') +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = plot_text_size))

f1

overlaps_exact = overlaps %>% 
    as.data.frame()

overlaps_exact$gene = exact_splice_site$gene
overlaps_exact$junc_cat = exact_splice_site$junc_cat
overlaps_exact$new_cate = exact_splice_site$new_cate

overlaps_exact %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = distance, color = new_cate)) + 
    geom_density()
```

```{r binding_sites_heatmap}
# Calculate total counts for each TDP43 sensitivity group
total_counts <- df_iclip %>%
  group_by(tdp43_sensitivity_sh, cryptic) %>%
  summarize(total = n())

# Calculate percentages
heatmap_data <- df_iclip %>%
  filter(tdp43_sensitivity_sh %in% c("Early", "Late")) %>%
  filter(abs(dist) <= 250) %>%
  group_by(tdp43_sensitivity_sh, cryptic) %>%
  summarize(count = n(), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  left_join(total_counts, by = c("tdp43_sensitivity_sh", "cryptic")) %>%
  mutate(percentage = round(count / total * 100, 0)) %>%
  select(-count, -total) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = cryptic, 
    values_from = percentage, 
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var = "tdp43_sensitivity_sh")

heatmap_plot <- heatmap_data %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "tdp43_sensitivity_sh") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("yes", "no"), names_to = "Cryptic", values_to = "Percentage")
heatmap_plot$tdp43_sensitivity_sh <- factor(heatmap_plot$tdp43_sensitivity_sh, levels=c("Late","Early"))
ggplot(heatmap_plot, aes(x = Cryptic, y = tdp43_sensitivity_sh, fill = Percentage)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Percentage, "%")), vjust = 0.5, hjust = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low="saddlebrown", high="palegreen1") +
  labs(title = "", 
       y = "TDP43 sensitivity", 
       x = "Cryptic") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=c("Alternative splicing", "Cryptic splicing"))+
  guides(fill="none") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = plot_text_size))
```

```{r rnamaps_figure}
#G. RNA maps 
early_donors <- readDNAStringSet("data/maxent/donors_early_combined.fa")
late_donors <- readDNAStringSet("data/maxent/donors_late_combined.fa")

g1 <- ggplot() +
  geom_logo(data = as.character(early_donors), method = "probability")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("A" = "black", "C" = "black", "G" = "palegreen2", "T" = "palegreen2")) +
  labs( x = "Position", y = "Probability") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "lines")  # Adjust plot margins
  )
g2 <- ggplot() +
  geom_logo(data = as.character(late_donors), method = "probability")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("A" = "black", "C" = "black", "G" = "palegreen2", "T" = "palegreen2")) +
  labs( x = "Position", y = "Probability") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "lines")  # Adjust plot margins
  )
g <- g1 / g2
g
```

## Detection by early late post-mortem

```{r fpr_early_late_max_min}

nygc = fread("~/Desktop/nygc_postmortem_summary.csv")
rimod = fread("~/Desktop/rimod_post.csv")
summary_post = rbind(nygc,rimod)
cryptic_early_late = master_table %>% 
    filter(cryptic == 'yes') %>% 
    filter(new_cate %in% c("Early","Late"))

early_late_post = generate_summary_table(summary_post,
                       cryptic_early_late,
                            category_column = 'new_cate')
fisher_timing = run_fisher_test(early_late_post,
                                category_column = 'new_cate')

early_late_plots = make_final_plot(early_late_post,
                                      fisher_timing,
                                      category_column = 'new_cate',
                                      color_choices = c("#de53b0", "#173dd3"))
early_late_plots$detection_plot + 
          ggtitle('Early/Late Detection Rate') + 
    theme(text = element_text(size = 18)) +
        guides(x = guide_axis(n.dodge = 2)) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))


early_late_plots$selectivity_plot + ggtitle('Early/Late Selectivity Rate') +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 18)) +
        theme(text = element_text(size = 18)) +
        guides(x = guide_axis(n.dodge = 2)) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5))


```



```{r}
full_summary_table = fread("/Users/annaleigh/Desktop/long_version.csv")
full_summary_table %>% 
    filter(chx_effect == 'Dark cryptic') %>% 
    filter(datasets_detected == 'CHX -SHY5Y') %>% 
    filter(fpr_value < 0.1 & value_tdp_path >=5)

```




```{r detection_rate_early_late_max_min}


master_table %>% 
    mutate(new_max = case_when(max_psi_be2 == max_psi_sh ~ max_psi_sh,
                               max_psi_be2 == "" ~ max_psi_sh,
                               max_psi_sh == "" ~ max_psi_be2,
                               max_psi_be2 == 'Medium' ~ max_psi_sh,
                               max_psi_sh == 'Medium' ~ max_psi_be2)) %>% 
    filter(!is.na(new_max)) %>% 
    left_join(postmortem_summary) %>% 
    filter(new_cate %in% c("Early","Late")) %>% 
    filter(new_max %in% c("Top","Bottom")) %>% 
    filter(fpr_value <= 0.1) %>% 
    filter(!is.na(group)) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = new_max, y =frac_ob_tdp_path,fill = new_cate)) + 
    geom_boxplot() +
    # facet_wrap(~group,scales = 'free')  +
    stat_summary(fun.data = give.n, geom = "text",
                                  fun.y = median,
                                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),color = 'white') +
  stat_compare_means(label = "p.signif",size = 15,label.y.npc = 'middle') +
    theme_classic() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#de53b0","#173dd3")) +
    # scale_fill_manual(values = plot_psi_colors) +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 18)) +
    ylab("Fraction samples observed") +
    ggtitle('FPR <= 0.1')

```



## Does NMD sensitivity determine early/lateness?

```{r NMDSensNewCate_chx}

new_cate_nmd_sens = wide_chx %>% 
    distinct(paste_into_igv_junction,chx_effect) %>% 
    left_join(master_table) %>% 
    filter(!is.na(new_cate)) %>% 
    filter(new_cate != "") %>% 
    filter(junction_for_clustering == 'yes') %>% 
    mutate(chx_effect = ifelse(chx_effect == "Dark cryptic","NMD rescued",chx_effect)) %>% 
    group_by(chx_effect,new_cate) %>% 
    reframe(n = n_distinct(paste_into_igv_junction))

ggplot(new_cate_nmd_sens) +
    aes(x = new_cate, fill = chx_effect, weight = n, by = as.factor(new_cate)) +
    geom_bar() +
    geom_text(
        aes(label = scales::percent(after_stat(prop), accuracy = 1)),
        stat = "prop",
        position = position_stack(.5)
    ) +
    theme_classic() + 
    labs(y = 'N junctions',
         x = element_blank(),
         fill = 'Cycloheximide treatment') +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#3288BD","#D53E4F","#BFCC94")) + 
    theme(legend.position = 'bottom') +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 18))

new_cate_nmd_sens %>% 
    filter(chx_effect != "PSI > 95% at baseline") %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = 'chx_effect',values_from = 'n') %>% 
    column_to_rownames("new_cate") %>% 
    as.matrix() %>% 
    rstatix::pairwise_fisher_test()

```

```{r NMDSensNewCate_upf1}

new_cate_nmd_sens_upf1 = wide_chx %>% 
    distinct(paste_into_igv_junction,chx_effect) %>% 
    left_join(master_table) %>% 
    filter(!is.na(new_cate)) %>% 
    filter(new_cate != "") %>% 
    filter(junction_for_clustering == 'yes') %>% 
    mutate(chx_effect = ifelse(chx_effect == "Dark cryptic","NMD rescued",chx_effect)) %>% 
    group_by(chx_effect,new_cate) %>% 
    reframe(n = n_distinct(paste_into_igv_junction))

ggplot(new_cate_nmd_sens) +
    aes(x = new_cate, fill = chx_effect, weight = n, by = as.factor(new_cate)) +
    geom_bar() +
    geom_text(
        aes(label = scales::percent(after_stat(prop), accuracy = 1)),
        stat = "prop",
        position = position_stack(.5)
    ) +
    theme_classic() + 
    labs(y = 'N junctions',
         x = element_blank(),
         fill = 'Cycloheximide treatment') +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#3288BD","#D53E4F","#BFCC94")) + 
    theme(legend.position = 'bottom') 

new_cate_nmd_sens %>% 
    filter(chx_effect != "PSI > 95% at baseline") %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = 'chx_effect',values_from = 'n') %>% 
    column_to_rownames("new_cate") %>% 
    as.matrix() %>% 
    rstatix::pairwise_fisher_test()

```





```{r }




chx_g_e = chx_slope_plot_table$filtered_table %>% 
    ungroup() %>%  
    distinct(color_gene_name,gene_name) %>% 
    filter(gene_name %in% master_table$gene) %>% group_by(gene_name) %>%
    # Create a new column indicating if any row in the group has "NMD rescued"
    mutate(nmd_status = if_else(any(color_gene_name == "NMD rescued"), 
                                "NMD rescued", 
                                "non-NMD rescued")) %>%
    # Remove the grouping
    ungroup() %>% 
    select(-color_gene_name) %>% 
    unique()
smgi_g_e = pseudo_bulk_plot_slope$filtered_table %>% 
    ungroup() %>%  
    distinct(color_gene_name,gene_name) %>% 
    filter(gene_name %in% master_table$gene) %>% group_by(gene_name) %>%
    # Create a new column indicating if any row in the group has "NMD rescued"
    mutate(nmd_status = if_else(any(color_gene_name == "NMD rescued"), 
                                "NMD rescued", 
                                "non-NMD rescued")) %>%
    # Remove the grouping
    ungroup() %>% 
    select(-color_gene_name) %>% 
    unique()
chx_g_e %>% 
    left_join(smgi_g_e,by = c('gene_name')) %>% 
    filter(nmd_status.x != nmd_status.y)
####read in data!!
big_delta_de <- read.csv(here::here('data','big_delta_de.csv'))

for_plot <- big_delta_de[,c(4,8,10,11)] %>%
  # dplyr::filter(symbol == "STMN2" | symbol == "AARS1" | symbol == "HDGFL2" | symbol == "UNC13A" |
  #                 symbol == "SYNE1" | symbol == "CYFIP2")
    filter(symbol %in% master_table$gene)
for_plot_0 <- for_plot %>% 
  distinct(symbol, .keep_all = T) %>% 
  mutate(log2FoldChange = 0, padj = 0, source = 0)
for_plot <- rbind(for_plot_0,for_plot) %>% 
  mutate(symbol = factor(symbol, levels = c("AARS1", "HDGFL2", "SYNE1", "CYFIP2", "UNC13A", "STMN2")))

big_delta_de_tdp <- big_delta_de[,c(4,8,10,11)] %>% 
  dplyr::filter(symbol == "TARDBP")
for_plot_0_tdp <- big_delta_de_tdp[1,] %>% 
  mutate(log2FoldChange = 0, padj = 0, source = 0)
big_delta_de_tdp <- rbind(for_plot_0_tdp,big_delta_de_tdp)

for_plot$source <- as.factor(for_plot$source)
for_plot %>%   
    left_join(chx_g_e,by = c("symbol" = 'gene_name')) %>% 
    left_join(master_table %>% distinct(gene,new_cate,cryptic),by = c("symbol" = 'gene')) %>% 
    filter(new_cate %in% c("Early","Late")) %>% 
    filter(!is.na(nmd_status)) %>% 
    filter(cryptic == 'yes' & nmd_status == 'NMD rescued' & log2FoldChange > 1)
    ggplot(aes(x = source, y= log2FoldChange,fill = new_cate)) + 
    facet_grid(vars(nmd_status),vars(cryptic)) + 
    geom_boxplot()
  ggplot() +
  # geom_col(aes(x = as.character(source), y = log2FoldChange, fill = symbol), 
  #          data = big_delta_de_tdp, alpha = 0.3, show.legend = F) +
  geom_point(aes(x = as.character(source), y = log2FoldChange, color = symbol, group = symbol), ) +
  geom_line(aes(x = as.character(source), y = log2FoldChange, color = symbol, group = symbol), show.legend = F) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = "black") +
    facet_wrap(~nmd_status)
  # scale_color_manual(values = c("#A6CEE3", "#1F78B4", "#FF7F00", "#FDBF6F", "#FB9A99", "#E31A1C"))+ # "#B2DF8A" "#33A02C" "#CAB2D6" "#6A3D9A")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-6.2,0.6)) +
  labs(x = "Doxycycline concentration", y = "Log2 Fold Change compared to control", color = "", fill = "Gene") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))
a
#ggsave("~/Desktop/curves_nmd.png", width = 6, height = 4)



big_delta_de_dz <- read.csv(here::here('data','big_delta_de_dz.csv'))


big_delta_de_dz_tdp <- big_delta_de_dz[,c(4,8,10,11)] %>% 
  dplyr::filter(symbol == "TARDBP")
for_plot_dz_0_tdp <- big_delta_de_dz_tdp[1,] %>% 
  mutate(log2FoldChange = 0, padj = 0, source = 0)
big_delta_de_dz_tdp <- rbind(for_plot_dz_0_tdp,big_delta_de_dz_tdp)

for_plot_dz <- big_delta_de_dz[,c(4,8,10,11)] %>%
  dplyr::filter(symbol == "STMN2" | symbol == "AARS1" | symbol == "HDGFL2" | symbol == "UNC13A" |
                  symbol == "SYNE1" | symbol == "CYFIP2")
for_plot_dz_0 <- for_plot_dz %>% 
  distinct(symbol, .keep_all = T) %>% 
  mutate(log2FoldChange = 0, padj = 0, source = 0)
for_plot_dz <- rbind(for_plot_dz_0,for_plot_dz) %>% 
  mutate(symbol = factor(symbol, levels = c("AARS1", "HDGFL2", "SYNE1", "CYFIP2", "UNC13A", "STMN2")))

for_plot_dz$source <- as.factor(for_plot_dz$source)
b <- for_plot_dz %>%   
  ggplot() +
  geom_col(aes(x = as.character(source), y = log2FoldChange, fill = symbol), data = big_delta_de_dz_tdp, alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_point(aes(x = source, y = log2FoldChange, color = symbol, group = symbol)) +
  geom_line(aes(x = source, y = log2FoldChange, color = symbol, group = symbol)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = "black") +
  # scale_color_manual(values = c("#A6CEE3", "#1F78B4", "#FF7F00", "#FDBF6F", "#FB9A99", "#E31A1C"))+ # "#B2DF8A" "#33A02C" "#CAB2D6" "#6A3D9A")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-5.2,0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Doxycycline concentration", y = "Log2 Fold Change compared to control", color = "", fill = "Gene") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))
b
#ggsave("~/Desktop/curves_nmd_dz.png", width = 6, height = 4)

#library(patchwork)

a+b

#ggsave("~/Desktop/caio.png", caio, width = 8, height = 4)




print("3G")

```



## Figure 4 - compendium / in vivo

```{r}

compendium_events = fread('data/compendium_cryptics.csv')

bind_table = master_table %>% 
    distinct(paste_into_igv_junction,gene,strand) %>% 
    dplyr::rename(gene_name = gene) %>% 
    rbind((compendium_events %>% distinct(gene_name,paste_into_igv_junction,strand))) %>% 
    dplyr::rename(junctions_coords = paste_into_igv_junction) %>% 
    unique() %>% 
    group_by(junctions_coords) %>% 
    mutate(gene_name = paste0(gene_name, collapse = ",")) %>% 
    ungroup() %>% 
    select(-strand) %>% 
    unique()


```




```{r tpr nmd sens}
facet_labels <- c(

tpr_value_rimod = "  RiMOD\nFTLD Frontal Cortex",

tpr_value_ftd_cortex = " NYGC\nFTLD Frontal\nTemporal Cortex",

tpr_value_als_cortex = "NYGC\nALS Motor Cortex",

tpr_value_cord = "NYGC\nALS Spinal Cord"

)

chx_insensitive = 
    chx_slope_plot_table$filtered_table %>% 
    filter(color_gene_name == 'NMD rescued') %>% 
    pull(paste_into_igv_junction) %>% unique()

smg1_insensitive = smg1_slope_plot_table_cyto$filtered_table %>% 
    filter(color_gene_name == 'non-NMD rescued') %>% 
    pull(paste_into_igv_junction) %>% unique()

upf1_insensitive = upf1_slope_plot_table$filtered_table %>% 
    filter(color_gene_name == 'NMD rescued') %>% 
    pull(paste_into_igv_junction) %>% unique()

combined_effect = c(chx_insensitive,smg1_insensitive,upf1_insensitive)

combine_events(chx_slope_plot_table$filtered_table,smg1_slope_plot_table_cyto$filtered_table,
               upf1_slope_plot_table$filtered_table,
               column = 'paste_into_igv_junction')


rimod_detection %>% 
    filter(fpr_value < 0.1) %>% 
    left_join(smg1_slope_plot_table_cyto$filtered_table %>% distinct(paste_into_igv_junction,color_gene_name)) %>% 
    filter(!is.na(color_gene_name)) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = color_gene_name, y= auc)) + 
    geom_boxplot() +
            stat_summary(fun.data = give.n, geom = "text",
                     fun.y = median,
                     position = position_dodge(width = 0.75)) +
    ggpubr::stat_compare_means(
    method = "wilcox.test",  # Explicitly specify method if needed
    formula = value ~ chx_rescue         # Explicit formula to avoid ambiguity
  )

tpr_across_ds_plot_table %>% 
    filter(tpr_value_cord >= 0.1) %>% 
    mutate(nmd_stable = ifelse(paste_into_igv_junction %in% chx_insensitive,"NMD-stable","other")) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = nmd_stable, y = tpr_value_cord)) + 
    geom_boxplot() +
        stat_summary(fun.data = give.n, geom = "text",
                     fun.y = median,
                     position = position_dodge(width = 0.75)) +
    ggpubr::stat_compare_means(
    method = "wilcox.test",  # Explicitly specify method if needed
    formula = value ~ chx_rescue         # Explicit formula to avoid ambiguity
  )

tpr_across_ds_plot_table %>% 
    filter(tpr_value_rimod >= 0.1) %>% 
    mutate(nmd_stable = ifelse(paste_into_igv_junction %in% chx_insensitive,"NMD-stable","other")) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = nmd_stable, y = tpr_value_rimod)) + 
    geom_boxplot() +
        stat_summary(fun.data = give.n, geom = "text",
                     fun.y = median,
                     position = position_dodge(width = 0.75)) +
    ggpubr::stat_compare_means(
    method = "wilcox.test",  # Explicitly specify method if needed
    formula = value ~ chx_rescue         # Explicit formula to avoid ambiguity
  )

tpr_across_ds_plot_table %>% 
    filter(tpr_value_ftd_cortex >= 0.1) %>% 
    mutate(nmd_stable = ifelse(paste_into_igv_junction %in% chx_insensitive,"NMD-stable","other")) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = nmd_stable, y = tpr_value_ftd_cortex)) + 
    geom_boxplot() +
        stat_summary(fun.data = give.n, geom = "text",
                     fun.y = median,
                     position = position_dodge(width = 0.75)) +
    ggpubr::stat_compare_means(
    method = "wilcox.test",  # Explicitly specify method if needed
    formula = value ~ chx_rescue         # Explicit formula to avoid ambiguity
  )

```



```{r targeted_panel, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
print("4A")
##load targeted seq table and compute CE ratio / rename samples in agreement to UNC13A paper
maxc <- read.csv(here::here('data',"count_table_of_aligned_remove_200bp_plus_product_reads.csv")) %>%
  mutate(fraction_cryptic = n_cryptic / n_counts_for_gene) %>%
  mutate(sample_name_ari = case_when(sample_name == "P64_11" ~ "HC1",
                                     sample_name == "P17_07" ~ "HC2",
                                     sample_name == "P47_11" ~ "HC3",
                                     sample_name == "P35_07" ~ "HC4",
                                     sample_name == "P56_13" ~ "FTD1",
                                     sample_name == "P45_15" ~ "FTD2",
                                     sample_name == "P63_05" ~ "FTD3",
                                     sample_name == "P28_07" ~ "FTD4",
                                     sample_name == "P40_04" ~ "FTD5",
                                     sample_name == "P07_15" ~ "FTD6",
                                     sample_name == "P16_09" ~ "FTD7",
                                     sample_name == "P86_08" ~ "FTD8",
                                     sample_name == "P13_13" ~ "FTD9",
                                     sample_name == "P11_07" ~ "FTE10",
                                     sample_name == "ddH2O" ~ "HO2O")) #%>%
  #pivot_wider(names_from = sample_name_ari, values_from = ratio_cryptic)
table(maxc$sample_name_ari)

##use only TDP43path-specific genes (use list from AL) - this is exluding more than 2/3 of genes!!
al <- read.csv(here::here('data',"expression_by_pathology_updated.csv")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(fraction_path > 0.01 & fraction_not_path < 0.005) %>% ####need to carefully check this with AL
  distinct(gene, .keep_all = T) ##check when binding with annotated validation table - should be ok since left_join
names(al)[4] <- "gene_name"
maxc_al <- maxc %>%
  left_join(al, by = "gene_name") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(paste_into_igv_junction))
table(maxc_al$sample_name_ari)
table(maxc_al$gene_name)

##check igv files for these genes
maxc_type <- maxc_al %>%
  select(-type) %>%
  mutate(gene = gene_name) %>%
  filter(gene_name != "SETD5") %>%
  left_join(master_table, by = "paste_into_igv_junction") %>%
  filter(!is.na(tdp43_sensitivity_sh)) %>% 
  mutate(group = ifelse(grepl("FT", sample_name_ari), "FTD",
                        ifelse(grepl("HC", sample_name_ari), "HC",
                               "H2O"))) %>% 
  group_by(gene_name) %>%
  filter(sum(n_cryptic) > 0) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
    filter(group != "H2O")

maxc_type %>%
  filter(!is.na(new_cate)) %>%
  filter(gene_name != "SETD5") %>%
  #filter(n_cryptic>0) %>% 
  #filter(detected == "Yes") %>%
  filter(group != "H2O") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = new_cate, y = n_cryptic)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = new_cate)) +
  facet_wrap(facets = vars(group), ncol = 2) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("Count of cryptic exons detected by targeted panel") +
  labs(fill = "Category") +
  theme_bw()
ggsave("~/Desktop/grouped_panel.png", width = 8, height = 4)

maxc_earli <- maxc_type %>%
  filter(new_cate == "Early") %>%
  filter(gene_name != "SETD5") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = sample_name_ari, y = fraction_cryptic)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = gene_name), stat = "identity", position = "stack", color="black") + #position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  #facet_grid(facets = vars(gene_name)) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Reds") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,0.3)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "Earli") +
  #scale_fill_manual(values = randomcoloR::distinctColorPalette(k = 30)) +
  theme_bw()
maxc_early <- maxc_type %>%
  filter(new_cate == "Early") %>%
  filter(gene_name != "SETD5") %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = sample_name_ari, y = fraction_cryptic)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = gene_name), stat = "identity", position = "stack", color="black") +#position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  #facet_grid(facets = vars(gene_name)) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Reds") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,0.3)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "Early") +
  #scale_fill_manual(values = randomcoloR::distinctColorPalette(k = 30)) +
  theme_bw()
maxc_intermediate <- maxc_type %>%
  filter(new_cate == "Intermediate") %>%
  filter(gene_name != "SETD5") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = sample_name_ari, y = fraction_cryptic)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = gene_name), stat = "identity", position = "stack", color="black") +#position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  #facet_grid(facets = vars(gene_name)) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Greens") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,0.3)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "Intermediate") +
  #scale_fill_manual(values = randomcoloR::distinctColorPalette(k = 30)) +
  theme_bw()
maxc_late <- maxc_type %>%
  filter(new_cate == "Late") %>%
  filter(gene_name != "SETD5") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = sample_name_ari, y = fraction_cryptic)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill = gene_name), stat = "identity", position = "stack", color="black") +#position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  #facet_grid(facets = vars(gene_name)) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Blues") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,0.3)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "Late") +
  #scale_fill_manual(values = randomcoloR::distinctColorPalette(k = 30)) +
  theme_bw()
maxc_early / maxc_intermediate / maxc_late #/ maxc_na


```

```{r}
data = maxc_type %>% 
    distinct(sample_name_ari,new_cate,pc_cryptic,gene_name,group)  %>% 
    filter(!is.na(new_cate)) %>% 
    arrange(desc(group),sample_name_ari,new_cate)
# Define new_cate as an ordered factor
data$new_cate <- factor(data$new_cate, levels = c("Early", "Intermediate", "Late"))


heatmap_matrix = data %>% 
    select(-group,-new_cate) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = sample_name_ari, values_from = pc_cryptic) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("gene_name") %>% 
    as.matrix()
# Row annotation with an ordered factor
row_ha <- rowAnnotation(
  new_cate = data$new_cate[match(rownames(heatmap_matrix), data$gene_name)],
  col = list(new_cate = c("Early" = "#de53b0", "Intermediate" = "steelblue", "Late" = "#1331a7"))
)

# Column annotation (sample group)
column_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  group = data$group[match(colnames(heatmap_matrix), data$sample_name_ari)], 
  col = list(group = c("FTD" = "red", "HC" = "blue"))
)
ro <- order(factor(data$new_cate[match(rownames(heatmap_matrix), data$gene_name)], 
                          levels = c("Early", "Intermediate", "Late")))
Heatmap(
  heatmap_matrix,
  name = "pc_cryptic",
  top_annotation = column_ha,
  right_annotation = row_ha,
  row_order = ro,  # Use row_order to order rows by `new_cate`
  cluster_columns = FALSE,  # Keep manual ordering of columns
  cluster_rows = FALSE,  # Keep manual ordering of rows
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  show_row_names = TRUE
)

```





```{r}
summary_post %>% 
    filter(fpr_value <=0.1 & value_tdp_path >=5) %>% 
    select(group,paste_into_igv_junction,frac_ob_tdp_path,group,gene_name) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = 'group', values_from = 'frac_ob_tdp_path') %>% 
    filter(!is.na(`Motor Cortex`) & !is.na(Cord)) %>% 
    mutate(motor_rank = rank(`Motor Cortex`)) %>% 
    mutate(cord_rank = rank(Cord)) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = motor_rank, y = cord_rank)) + 
    geom_point() + 
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = gene_name)) + 
    geom_abline() + 
    stat_cor(method = 'spearman')

deseq2_normalized_salmon %>% 
    filter(symbol %in% c("FIRRE","EPB41L4A","KCNIP1")) %>% 
    filter(variable %in% nygc_metadata$sample) %>% 
    left_join(nygc_metadata %>% select(sample,group,tdp_proteinopathy,
                                       rna_tissue_source_simplified),by = c("variable" = 'sample')) %>% 
    filter(!is.na(group)) %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = group, y = value,fill = group)) +
    geom_boxplot() +
    facet_wrap(~symbol, scales = 'free' )
```

